titleStmt.title: SII 35.94: original edition by D. M. Nagaraju
No. 94. (A.R. No. 87 of 1951-52.) HIRĒKERŪR, KOD TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

summary.p: Stone set up near the tank close to the village.

This inscription referring itself to the reign of Vīrapratāpa Sadāśivarāya is dated Śaka 1472, Sādhāraṇa, Jyēshṭha ba. 5, which may probably be corresponding to Friday, May 23, A.D. 1550. The cyclic year on this day was Piṅgaḷa and not Sādhāraṇa as mentioned in the record.

It records a gift of taxes such as siddhāya and tax on houses, gifts, marriages, on Mahānavami (festival) to barbers Timmōja, Koṁḍōja and Bhadrōja. This sort of privilege was given to the barbers in the whole kingdom of Sadāśivarāya. The gift was recognized as sarvamānya in the locality (sīme) of Koḍa.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
ṁ namastuṁgaśiraścuṁbi caṁdracāmaracāravē trayilōkyanagarāraṁbha mūlastaṁbhāya
ṁ saṁbhavē svasti jayābhyudayaśālivāhana śakavaruśa 1472 neya sādhāraṇa saṁ
ṁ vatsarada jēṣṭa ba 5 lū śrīmanmahārājādhirāja rājaparamēśvara kaṭhāri
ṁ sāḷva śrī vīrapratāpa śrīsadāśivarāyamahārāyarū vidyānagari
ṁ ya paṭṭaṇadalu sukhasaṁtōṣa līlāvinōdadiṁ pṛthviya rājyaṁ geyi
ṁ Uttaṁyiralu śrīsadāśivamahārāyara dakṣiṇa bhujādaṁḍa śrīmaThe letter ṇa is engraved above the line.
ṁ nmahāmaṁḍaḷēsvara svāmige svāmidrōhara gaṁḍa gaḍiyaṁka bhīma rā
ṁ ma rājēṁdra mahā Arasugaḷu gaḍḍada kelasigaḷā tiṁmōja koṁḍōja
ṁ bhadrōja yivaru mūvara kelasakke mecci mannisalāgi sadaśivarā
ṁ yaru Āḷuvaṁthā rājyavoḷagaṇa gaḍḍada kelasigaḷige teṟige
ṁ sidhāya manevaṇa kāṇike kaḍḍāya maduveyasuṁka mahānau
ṁ miya Āḷu Ā kālacakra muṁtāgi teṟuvaṁtā haṇava pālasa
ṁ bēku Eṁdu biṁnāhaṁ māḍalāgi teṟuvaṁtādu Ellavanu pā
ṁ lasi sa¨rvamānya māḍidaru yi gaḍḍada kelasigaḷa makehalida
ṁ dha¨rmavanu Āva Aḷupidare taṁma guru taṁdetāyi gōU brāhma
ṁ ranu sōmōparāga sū¨ryōparāgadalli vāraṇāsi kaṁkuru
ṁ kṣētradalli koṁda pāpakke hōharū śrī virūpākṣa liṁga sā
ṁ kṣi . kraṣayaḍeba ṟaṭa haḷi sīmege salu
ṁ va kōḍada sīme gaḷige sa¨rvamānya Eṁdu
ṁ pālisidaru śrī
Digital edition of SII 35.94 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
